title: Let's Live a Little
writer: Howard Irving Young, Edmund L. Hartmann, Albert J. Cohen
actors: Hedy Lamarr, Robert Cummings, Anna Sten
plot: A harried, overworked advertising executive is being pursued romantically by one of his clients, a successful perfume magnate ... and his former fiancée. The latest client of the agency is a psychiatrist and author of a new book. ...
